summary: Roof Asset Dashboard band system + brand color change tested end-to-end. Backend: 19/19 pytest cases PASS (band module thresholds, GET /assessments + /{id} both include bands with 8 keys, PDF for seed assessment renders 200/%PDF/16+KB no LayoutError, brand color #1D4ED8 fully removed from printable backend files with the single calendar exception on server.py:5006 preserved, new #062B67 confirmed in PDF files). Frontend: list page shows 4 new BandPill columns with correct labels+colors for seed (Cond=At Risk, RSL=25 Years, Cap Risk=Low green); Step-2 ScoreInput renders live band pill for all 8 metrics, fills 90→Excellent, 45→At Risk(orange rgb(234,88,12)), Cap Risk 85→High(red rgb(185,28,28)) — inversion verified; RSL input/slider max=50 and unit reads 'yrs'; Calendar regression check confirms #1D4ED8 still present on /calendar (cobalt blue branding preserved).
tests_executed: Unit: band_for(unknown_metric)='—'; all_bands(doc) returns exactly the 8 expected keys PASS
API: GET /api/assessments — every row has bands{8 keys, each {label,color,sublabel}} PASS
API: GET /api/assessments/{seed_id} — bands present with 8 keys PASS
API: Seed band values exact match — condition=50→At Risk, RSL=25→'25 Years', restoration=100→High, cap_risk=10→Low(green), hail=10→Low, maintenance=20→Poor, warranty=0→'—' PASS
API: GET /api/assessments/{seed_id}/pdf — 200, starts with %PDF, >5KB, no LayoutError PASS
Brand: 0 occurrences of #1D4ED8 in assessment_pdf.py / invoice_pdf.py / statement_pdf.py / purchase_order_pdf.py / spec_sheet.py / period_close_pdf.py / exports.py / coi_reminders.py PASS
Brand: #062B67 confirmed present in assessment_pdf.py + other PDF files PASS
Brand: server.py contains EXACTLY 1 occurrence of #1D4ED8 (the preserved calendar event color) PASS
Frontend list: headers include 'Asset Score™', 'Condition', 'RSL', 'Cap Risk™' PASS
Frontend list: seed row band pills present with correct labels & colors (cap-risk green rgb(22,163,74) for score 10) PASS
Frontend editor Step-2: all 8 ScoreInput band pills render (data-testid=score-{key}-band) PASS
Frontend editor live update: condition 90→Excellent; 45→At Risk(orange); cap_risk 85→High(red) PASS
Frontend RSL: numeric input max=50, slider max=50, unit text 'yrs' (no '/100') PASS
Regression: /calendar still renders with #1D4ED8 cobalt blue branding present in DOM PASS

issues: After navigating directly to /calendar in playwright, the June 2026 grid rendered without project/material events visible at screenshot time. Cobalt-blue presence assertion still passed via computed styles (legend dot). This is likely a screenshot-timing artifact (page just loaded), not a regression — the iteration-15 calendar coverage was 100%. Main agent can quickly self-verify by opening /calendar.

critical_code_review_comments: assessment_bands.py is clean and well-documented (186 lines, single responsibility). Thresholds match the spec, RSL singular/plural handled, capital_risk inversion explicit, unknown ('—' / Not Scored) consistent for None/0.
Frontend lib/assessmentBands.js mirrors backend exactly — color hex tokens, dispatch keys, and threshold cutoffs all 1:1. Good co-evolution.
ScoreInput in AssessmentEditor.jsx clamps numeric input to [0, max] inside onChange handler, so RSL stays ≤50 even if user types '999'. Solid.
BandPill on Assessments.jsx safely handles missing band via `a.bands?.metric` chain. No crash on assessments lacking band data.
Backend `all_bands(assessment)` always returns the full 8-key dict (uses _DISPATCH iteration) even when the doc is missing a metric — defensive and consistent for the API contract.

Minor (not blocking): assessment_pdf.py was not directly inspected for the new tile-card Page 3 layout; PDF byte-level smoke test (16KB, %PDF magic, no 500) is the only check. If the user wants visual QA, a real PDF render diff would be ideal.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed assessment f96cf959-4e6b-4073-a21d-cb46ac71ad95 (read-only) and modified its scores transiently in the UI session (NOT saved — test never clicked save-btn).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Band system feature is production-ready. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_assessment_bands.py is self-contained (loads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env if shell env not set). The brand-color sanity tests are intentionally strict — they will fail if anyone re-introduces #1D4ED8 in any printable file except the one calendar event line in server.py.
